gist.headline: Paper planes on autopilot
gist.blurb: TelegramChannelAI just joined the community showcase. It's an AI-powered content pipeline that runs your Telegram channel so you don't have to.
gist.summary: Added TelegramChannelAI to the community showcase, highlighting a new tool for automating Telegram channel management.
gist.impact: Creators can discover a new community-built pipeline for generating and posting content directly to Telegram.
gist.visual_concept: Telegram is universally recognized by a paper airplane. Automation is represented by a conveyor belt or assembly line. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together to fold and launch paper airplanes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny pilot's hat, working alongside a chunky monitor-headed robot to fold and launch blue paper airplanes from a small wooden conveyor belt. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. The bee has a yellow body, dark stripes, and pink blush, while the robot has expressive square pixel eyes. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Text in pixel font: 'SEND IT'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
